<span class="zadano-text">$t=10^\circ\text{C}$, $d=50\,\text{mm}$, $L=80\,\text{m}$, $h=9\,\text{m}$, $\dot{V}=6\,\text{L/s}$, $k=0,26\,\text{mm}$, $z_2=4\,\text{m}$, $\sum \zeta = 2,36$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$z_1$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. $v = 3,06 \, \text{m/s}, Re = 116865, \lambda = 0,0315$.
2. $\sum \zeta = 2,36$.
3.

    $$
    h_w = \frac{v^2}{2g} \left( 2,36 + 0,0315 \frac{89}{0,05} \right)
    = \mathbf{27,8 \, \text{m}}
    $$
4. $z_1 = z_2 + h_w = \mathbf{31,8 \, \text{m}}$.

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Budžet gubitaka cjevovoda -->
<div id="z123-budget-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-shell {
            border-radius: 30px;
            border: 1px solid #dde6f4;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f9fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 26px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            max-width: 74ch;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-chip {
            align-self: start;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fef3c7, #ffedd5);
            border: 1px solid #fdba74;
            color: #c2410c;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-stage {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-scene {
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            background: #f8fafc;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(240px, 0.9fr) minmax(0, 1.1fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-total,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-metric,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-controls,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06);
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-total {
            padding: 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #ffffff);
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-total small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z123-hw-total {
            display: block;
            font-size: 1.6rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-total span {
            display: block;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-metric {
            padding: 14px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-metric strong {
            display: block;
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace;
            font-size: 0.98rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 0.95fr) minmax(0, 1.05fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-controls,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-explainer {
            padding: 18px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-control + .z123-control {
            margin-top: 18px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #475569;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-control input {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2563eb;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown-title {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            color: #64748b;
            text-align: center;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-track {
            display: flex;
            height: 30px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #e2e8f0;
        }
        #z123-bar-friction,
        #z123-bar-local {
            height: 100%;
        }
        #z123-bar-friction {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f97316, #fb923c);
        }
        #z123-bar-local {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #60a5fa);
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown-legend {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-top: 8px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown-legend span:first-child {
            color: #ea580c;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown-legend span:last-child {
            color: #2563eb;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-explainer {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-head,
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-summary,
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-lower,
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-metrics {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-explainer {
                grid-column: auto;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="z123-shell">
        <div class="z123-head">
            <div>
                <div class="z123-kicker">Z123 budžet gubitaka</div>
                <h4 class="z123-title">Tek kad razdvojiš linijske i lokalne gubitke postaje jasno koliko visoku uzvodnu kotu sustav doista traži</h4>
                <p class="z123-sub">Widget sada prvo prikazuje energijsku sliku između spremnika, odmah ispod daje ukupni gubitak i ključne brojeve `Re`, `λ` i `z₁`, a tek niže razlaže koliko otpada na trenje duž cijevi, a koliko na lokalne elemente.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="z123-chip">h_w = h_w,lin + h_w,loc</div>
        </div>

        <div class="z123-note"><strong>Kako čitati budžet:</strong> Prvo iz protoka i hrapavosti dobivaš <strong>Re</strong> i <strong>λ</strong>, zatim razdvajaš linijske i lokalne gubitke u istom cjevovodu. Tek njihov zbroj daje ukupni gubitak <strong>h_w</strong>, a on određuje potrebnu kotu slobodne površine <strong>z₁</strong>.</div>

        <div class="z123-stage">
            <div class="z123-scene">
                <canvas id="z123-canvas" width="520" height="520"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="z123-summary">
                <div class="z123-total">
                    <small>Ukupni gubitak h_w</small>
                    <strong id="z123-hw-total">27.8 m</strong>
                    <span>To je ukupna visina energije koju cjevovod mora potrošiti između uzvodnog i nizvodnog spremnika.</span>
                </div>
                <div class="z123-metrics">
                    <div class="z123-metric"><small>Re</small><strong id="z123-re-card">0</strong></div>
                    <div class="z123-metric"><small>λ</small><strong id="z123-lambda-card">0.0000</strong></div>
                    <div class="z123-metric"><small>z₁</small><strong id="z123-z1-card">0.0 m</strong></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="z123-lower">
            <div class="z123-controls">
                <div class="z123-control">
                    <label>Protok Q: <span id="z123-v-vdot" style="color:#2563eb;">6.0</span> L/s</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z123-vdot-slider" min="1" max="15" step="0.5" value="6">
                </div>
                <div class="z123-control">
                    <label>Hrapavost k: <span id="z123-v-k" style="color:#2563eb;">0.26</span> mm</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z123-k-slider" min="0.01" max="1.0" step="0.01" value="0.26">
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z123-breakdown">
                <div class="z123-breakdown-title">Raspodjela otpora [%]</div>
                <div class="z123-track">
                    <div id="z123-bar-friction" style="width: 90%;" title="Trenje u cijevi"></div>
                    <div id="z123-bar-local" style="width: 10%;" title="Lokalni gubici"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="z123-breakdown-legend">
                    <span>LINIJSKI (Trenje)</span>
                    <span>LOKALNI (Zeta)</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z123-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z123-explainer"></span></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z123-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const vdotS = document.getElementById('z123-vdot-slider'), kS = document.getElementById('z123-k-slider');

    function solveLambda(Re, kd) {
        if (Re < 2320) return 64 / Re;
        let f = 0.02;
        for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
            f = 1 / Math.pow(-2 * Math.log10(kd / 3.7 + 2.51 / (Re * Math.sqrt(f))), 2);
        }
        return f;
    }

    function update() {
        const vdot_l = parseFloat(vdotS.value), k_mm = parseFloat(kS.value);
        const d = 0.05, L = 89, rho = 1000, mu = 0.0013, g = 9.81;
        const A = Math.PI * d * d / 4;
        const v = (vdot_l / 1000) / A;
        const Re = (rho * v * d) / mu;
        const lambda = solveLambda(Re, k_mm / (d * 1000));

        const hw_lin = lambda * (L / d) * (v * v / (2 * g));
        const sum_zeta = 2.36;
        const hw_loc = sum_zeta * (v * v / (2 * g));
        const hw_total = hw_lin + hw_loc;
        const z1 = 4 + hw_total;

        const perc_lin = (hw_lin / hw_total) * 100;

        document.getElementById('z123-v-vdot').innerText = vdot_l.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z123-v-k').innerText = k_mm.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z123-hw-total').innerText = hw_total.toFixed(1) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z123-bar-friction').style.width = perc_lin + "%";
        document.getElementById('z123-bar-local').style.width = (100 - perc_lin) + "%";
        document.getElementById('z123-re-card').textContent = Math.round(Re);
        document.getElementById('z123-lambda-card').textContent = lambda.toFixed(4);
        document.getElementById('z123-z1-card').textContent = z1.toFixed(1) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z123-explainer').textContent = `Za protok ${vdot_l.toFixed(1)} L/s i hrapavost ${k_mm.toFixed(2)} mm dobivaš Re ≈ ${Math.round(Re)} i λ = ${lambda.toFixed(4)}. Linijski gubitak tada iznosi ${hw_lin.toFixed(1)} m, lokalni ${hw_loc.toFixed(1)} m, pa ukupni gubitak ${hw_total.toFixed(1)} m traži uzvodnu kotu z₁ ≈ ${z1.toFixed(1)} m.`;

        draw(hw_total, hw_lin, hw_loc);
    }

    function draw(hwt, hlin, hloc) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const oy = canvas.height - 44;
        const totalHead = 4 + hwt;
        const topPadding = 84;
        const scale = Math.min(10, (oy - topPadding) / Math.max(totalHead, 6));
        const sourceX = 28;
        const tankWidth = 92;
        const targetX = canvas.width - 120;
        const sourceTop = oy - totalHead * scale;
        const targetTop = oy - 4 * scale;
        const pipeY = oy - 24;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#ebf8ff';
        ctx.fillRect(sourceX, sourceTop, tankWidth, totalHead * scale);
        ctx.fillRect(targetX, targetTop, tankWidth, 4 * scale);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(sourceX, sourceTop, tankWidth, totalHead * scale);
        ctx.strokeRect(targetX, targetTop, tankWidth, 4 * scale);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 10;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(sourceX + tankWidth, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(targetX, pipeY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(sourceX + tankWidth, sourceTop);
        ctx.lineTo(targetX, targetTop - 6);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6';
        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(sourceX + tankWidth, sourceTop + 10);
        ctx.lineTo(targetX, targetTop + 6);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#1e293b';
        ctx.font = 'bold 11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('EGL', sourceX + tankWidth + 8, Math.max(28, sourceTop - 10));
        ctx.fillText('HGL', sourceX + tankWidth + 8, Math.max(44, sourceTop + 14));
        ctx.fillText('z1 = ' + totalHead.toFixed(1) + ' m', sourceX + 4, Math.max(26, sourceTop - 14));
        ctx.fillText('z2 = 4.0 m', targetX + 8, targetTop - 14);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.font = '11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('hw,lin = ' + hlin.toFixed(1) + ' m', canvas.width / 2 - 96, sourceTop + (targetTop - sourceTop) * 0.35);
        ctx.fillText('hw,loc = ' + hloc.toFixed(1) + ' m', canvas.width / 2 - 96, sourceTop + (targetTop - sourceTop) * 0.62);
    }

    vdotS.oninput = update; kS.oninput = update; update();
})();
</script>

```

***

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Zadatak Z124 — Paralelni cjevovodi {.unnumbered}

Voda temperature 20°C crpi se iz spremnika A u spremnik B putem dviju paralelnih cijevi duljine 36 m. Volumenski protok na izlazu iz pumpe iznosi 30 L/s. Zanemarujemo mjesne gubitke na račvi, sastavištu i koljenima.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$t=20^\circ\text{C}$, $L=36\,\text{m}$, $d_1=40\,\text{mm}$, $d_2=80\,\text{mm}$, $\dot{V}_{tot}=30\,\text{L/s}$, $k=0,045\,\text{mm}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$p_R$; $\dot{V}_1$; $\dot{V}_2$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. $v_2 = v_1 \sqrt{\frac{\lambda_1 d_2}{\lambda_2 d_1}} = 1,56 v_1$.
2.

    $$
    \dot{V}_{tot} = A_1 v_1 + A_2 (1,56 v_1)
    $$

    $$
    v_1 = \mathbf{3,29 \, \text{m/s}}, \qquad v_2 = \mathbf{5,15 \, \text{m/s}}
    $$
3. $\dot{V}_1 = \mathbf{4,1 \, \text{L/s}}, \dot{V}_2 = \mathbf{25,9 \, \text{L/s}}$.
4. $H_{pump} = (z_B - z_A) + h_{wl1} = \mathbf{18,93 \, \text{m}}$.

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Paralelne cijevi i raspodjela protoka -->
<div id="z124-parallel-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-shell {
            border-radius: 30px;
            border: 1px solid #d7f0eb;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fffd 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 26px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            max-width: 74ch;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-chip {
            align-self: start;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dcfce7, #ecfeff);
            border: 1px solid #a7f3d0;
            color: #047857;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-stage {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-scene {
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f9fcff 0%, #eef6ff 100%);
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(240px, 0.9fr) minmax(0, 1.1fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-pressure,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metric,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-controls,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-split,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.06);
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-pressure {
            padding: 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f0fdf4);
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-pressure small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z124-pr-val {
            display: block;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-pressure span {
            display: block;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            line-height: 1.55;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metric {
            padding: 14px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metric strong {
            display: block;
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace;
            font-size: 0.98rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 0.95fr) minmax(0, 1.05fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-controls,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-split,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-explainer {
            padding: 18px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-control + .z124-control {
            margin-top: 18px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #475569;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-control input {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2563eb;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-split {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ecfeff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
            border-left: 6px solid #0ea5e9;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-split-title {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 14px;
            color: #0f4c81;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-bar-label {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            color: #1e293b;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-track {
            height: 10px;
            background: #dbeafe;
            border-radius: 999px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        #z124-bar-v1,
        #z124-bar-v2 {
            height: 100%;
            border-radius: 999px;
        }
        #z124-bar-v1 {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #60a5fa);
        }
        #z124-bar-v2 {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10b981, #34d399);
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-split-item + .z124-split-item {
            margin-top: 14px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-explainer {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-head,
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-summary,
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-lower,
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metrics {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-explainer {
                grid-column: auto;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="z124-shell">
        <div class="z124-head">
            <div>
                <div class="z124-kicker">Z124 paralelne grane</div>
                <h4 class="z124-title">Raspodjela protoka ne bira se “po osjećaju”, nego iz uvjeta da obje grane troše istu visinu energije</h4>
                <p class="z124-sub">Novi raspored prvo izdvaja samu mrežu cijevi, odmah ispod daje tlak u račvi i ključne brzine, a zatim odvojeno pokazuje koje dvije kontrole mijenjaju odnos otpora i kako se protok dijeli između grana.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="z124-chip">h<wbr>w,1 = h<wbr>w,2</div>
        </div>

        <div class="z124-note"><strong>Kako čitati paralelne grane:</strong> U obje grane pad energije mora biti isti, pa raspodjela ne ovisi proizvoljno o protoku nego o hidrauličkom otporu svake grane. Šira cijev zato preuzima veći dio ukupnog protoka jer za isti gubitak može nositi veću brzinu.</div>

        <div class="z124-stage">
            <div class="z124-scene">
                <canvas id="z124-canvas" width="550" height="400"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="z124-summary">
                <div class="z124-pressure">
                    <small>Tlak u račvi p_R</small>
                    <strong id="z124-pr-val">--- kPa</strong>
                    <span>To je raspoloživi tlak u točki gdje se ukupni protok dijeli na dvije grane koje moraju završiti s istim gubitkom energije.</span>
                </div>
                <div class="z124-metrics">
                    <div class="z124-metric">
                        <small>v₁</small>
                        <strong id="z124-v1-card">0.00 m/s</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="z124-metric">
                        <small>v₂</small>
                        <strong id="z124-v2-card">0.00 m/s</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="z124-metric">
                        <small>v₂/v₁</small>
                        <strong id="z124-ratio-card">0.00</strong>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="z124-lower">
            <div class="z124-controls">
                <div class="z124-control">
                    <label>Ukupni protok Q_tot: <span id="z124-v-vtot" style="color:#2563eb;">30</span> L/s</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z124-vtot-slider" min="10" max="60" step="1" value="30">
                </div>
                <div class="z124-control">
                    <label>Promjer cijevi 2 (D2): <span id="z124-v-d2" style="color:#2563eb;">80</span> mm</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z124-d2-slider" min="40" max="120" step="5" value="80">
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z124-split">
                <div class="z124-split-title">Raspodjela protoka</div>
                <div class="z124-split-item">
                    <div class="z124-bar-label"><span>Cijev 1 (40 mm)</span><b id="z124-v1-out">4.1 L/s</b></div>
                    <div class="z124-track"><div id="z124-bar-v1" style="width: 14%;"></div></div>
                </div>
                <div class="z124-split-item">
                    <div class="z124-bar-label"><span>Cijev 2 (<span id="z124-d2-label">80</span> mm)</span><b id="z124-v2-out">25.9 L/s</b></div>
                    <div class="z124-track"><div id="z124-bar-v2" style="width: 86%;"></div></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z124-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z124-explainer"></span></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z124-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const vtotS = document.getElementById('z124-vtot-slider'), d2S = document.getElementById('z124-d2-slider');
    const state = { v1: 0, v2: 0, d1: 0.04, d2: 0.08, pr: 0, ratio: 0, vdot1: 0, vdot2: 0 };

    let particles = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) particles.push({ t: Math.random(), branch: Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : 2 });

    function update() {
        const vtot_l = parseFloat(vtotS.value), d2_mm = parseFloat(d2S.value);
        const d1 = 0.04, d2 = d2_mm / 1000, L = 36, rho = 998, g = 9.81;
        const lam1 = 0.022, lam2 = 0.018;

        const ratio_v = Math.sqrt((lam1 * d2) / (lam2 * d1));
        const A1 = Math.PI * d1 * d1 / 4;
        const A2 = Math.PI * d2 * d2 / 4;

        const v1 = (vtot_l / 1000) / (A1 + A2 * ratio_v);
        const v2 = v1 * ratio_v;
        const vdot1 = A1 * v1 * 1000;
        const vdot2 = A2 * v2 * 1000;

        const hw = lam1 * (L / d1) * (v1 * v1 / (2 * g));
        const pr = (rho * g * (13 - 5 + hw)) / 1000;

        state.v1 = v1;
        state.v2 = v2;
        state.d1 = d1;
        state.d2 = d2;
        state.pr = pr;
        state.ratio = ratio_v;
        state.vdot1 = vdot1;
        state.vdot2 = vdot2;

        document.getElementById('z124-v-vtot').innerText = vtot_l;
        document.getElementById('z124-v-d2').innerText = d2_mm;
        document.getElementById('z124-d2-label').innerText = d2_mm;
        document.getElementById('z124-v1-out').innerText = vdot1.toFixed(1) + ' L/s';
        document.getElementById('z124-v2-out').innerText = vdot2.toFixed(1) + ' L/s';
        document.getElementById('z124-bar-v1').style.width = (vdot1 / vtot_l * 100) + '%';
        document.getElementById('z124-bar-v2').style.width = (vdot2 / vtot_l * 100) + '%';
        document.getElementById('z124-pr-val').innerText = pr.toFixed(1) + ' kPa';
        document.getElementById('z124-v1-card').textContent = v1.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z124-v2-card').textContent = v2.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z124-ratio-card').textContent = ratio_v.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z124-explainer').textContent = `Za ukupni protok ${vtot_l.toFixed(0)} L/s i promjer druge cijevi ${d2_mm.toFixed(0)} mm uvjet jednakog gubitka daje omjer brzina v₂/v₁ = ${ratio_v.toFixed(2)}. Zato prva grana nosi ${vdot1.toFixed(1)} L/s, druga ${vdot2.toFixed(1)} L/s, a tlak u račvi ispada ${pr.toFixed(1)} kPa.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const cy = 200;
        const ox = 150;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fbff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(68, cy);
        ctx.lineTo(canvas.width - 48, cy);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox, cy, 15, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox + 250, cy, 15, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e0';
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineWidth = state.d1 * 500;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, cy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, cy - 80);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 250, cy - 80);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 250, cy);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.lineWidth = state.d2 * 500;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, cy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, cy + 80);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 250, cy + 80);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 250, cy);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#1e293b';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('grana 1', ox + 92, cy - 106);
        ctx.fillText('grana 2', ox + 92, cy + 118);

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            const currentV = particle.branch === 1 ? state.v1 : state.v2;
            particle.t += 0.005 * currentV;
            if (particle.t > 1) particle.t = 0;

            let px, py;
            const h = particle.branch === 1 ? -80 : 80;
            if (particle.t < 0.2) {
                px = ox;
                py = cy + (particle.t / 0.2) * h;
            } else if (particle.t < 0.8) {
                px = ox + ((particle.t - 0.2) / 0.6) * 250;
                py = cy + h;
            } else {
                px = ox + 250;
                py = cy + h - ((particle.t - 0.8) / 0.2) * h;
            }

            ctx.fillStyle = particle.branch === 1 ? '#3b82f6' : '#10b981';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.font = '12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('Qtot', ox - 48, cy - 22);
        ctx.fillText('isti gubitak energije u obje grane', ox + 112, cy + 22);
    }

    function frame() {
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(frame);
    }

    vtotS.oninput = update;
    d2S.oninput = update;
    update();
    frame();
})();
</script>

```

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- Flow Regime / Reynolds Widget -->
<div id="reynolds-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #reynolds-widget .rw-shell {
            border-radius: 30px;
            border: 1px solid #dce9f7;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 28px 64px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.09);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            max-width: 74ch;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-chip {
            align-self: start;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dcfce7, #dbeafe);
            border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
            color: #047857;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-stage {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-scene {
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #1e293b;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #172554 0%, #0f172a 60%, #020617 100%);
        }
        #reynolds-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(260px, 0.9fr) minmax(0, 1.1fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #re-status,
        #reynolds-widget .rw-metric,
        #reynolds-widget .rw-controls,
        #reynolds-widget .rw-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06);
        }
        #re-status {
            padding: 18px;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 800;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-metric {
            padding: 14px;
            text-align: center;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-metric strong,
        #re-dominant,
        #re-thresholds,
        #re-profile {
            display: block;
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 0.92fr) minmax(0, 1.08fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-controls,
        #reynolds-widget .rw-explainer {
            padding: 18px;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-controls label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: #475569;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-controls input {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2563eb;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-model {
            margin-top: 10px;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            color: #64748b;
            line-height: 1.55;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-explainer {
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #reynolds-widget .rw-head,
            #reynolds-widget .rw-summary,
            #reynolds-widget .rw-lower,
            #reynolds-widget .rw-metrics {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #reynolds-widget .rw-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="rw-shell">
        <div class="rw-head">
            <div>
                <div class="rw-kicker">Reynoldsov broj</div>
                <h3 class="rw-title">Brzina ne mijenja samo broj na ekranu nego i samu prirodu toka: od urednih slojeva do vrtložnog miješanja</h3>
                <p class="rw-sub">Ovdje je završni polish fokusiran na preglednost: scena ostaje čista, a status režima, dominantni učinak i profil brzine čitaju se odmah ispod canvasa istim ritmom kao i ostatak vježbe.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="rw-chip">v -> Re -> režim</div>
        </div>

        <div class="rw-note"><strong>Kako čitati režim:</strong> Ovdje je modelirana voda u maloj cijevi promjera <strong>2 mm</strong>, pa pomicanjem brzine možeš stvarno proći kroz sve tri zone. Lijevo vidiš kako se uređene strujnice pretvaraju u valovit i vrtložan tok, a desno kako se profil brzine iz paraboličnog spljoštava u turbulentni „čepasti" profil.</div>

        <div class="rw-stage">
            <div class="rw-scene">
                <canvas id="flow-canvas" width="920" height="340"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="rw-summary">
                <div id="re-status">Re = 1000 (Laminarno)</div>
                <div class="rw-metrics">
                    <div class="rw-metric"><small>Dominira</small><strong id="re-dominant">viskoznost</strong></div>
                    <div class="rw-metric"><small>Pragovi</small><strong id="re-thresholds">2300 / 4000</strong></div>
                    <div class="rw-metric"><small>Profil</small><strong id="re-profile">parabola</strong></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="rw-lower">
            <div class="rw-controls">
                <label>Brzina strujanja v: <span id="v-re-val" style="color:#2563eb;">0.50</span> m/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="v-re-slider" min="0.05" max="5" step="0.05" value="0.5">
                <div class="rw-model">Model: voda, ν = 1.0×10⁻⁶ m²/s, d = 2 mm.</div>
            </div>

            <div class="rw-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="re-explainer"></span></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const vS = document.getElementById('v-re-slider');
    const canvas = document.getElementById('flow-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const status = document.getElementById('re-status');
    const lanes = [-0.86, -0.7, -0.54, -0.38, -0.22, -0.06, 0.06, 0.22, 0.38, 0.54, 0.7, 0.86];
    const particles = [];
    const state = { v: 0.5, re: 1000, regime: 'Laminarno', dominant: 'viskoznost', profile: 'parabola', color: '#22c55e', mix: 0, time: 0 };
    const d = 0.002;
    const nu = 1e-6;

    lanes.forEach((lane, laneIndex) => {
        for (let index = 0; index < 8; index++) {
            particles.push({ lane, phase: (index / 8 + laneIndex * 0.025) % 1, bias: 0.85 + Math.random() * 0.3 });
        }
    });

    function classify(re) {
        if (re < 2300) return { regime: 'Laminarno', dominant: 'viskoznost', profile: 'parabola', color: '#22c55e', mix: 0 };
        if (re < 4000) return { regime: 'Prijelazno', dominant: 'oba učinka', profile: 'spljošten', color: '#f59e0b', mix: (re - 2300) / 1700 };
        return { regime: 'Turbulentno', dominant: 'inercija', profile: 'čepast', color: '#ef4444', mix: 1 };
    }

    function laneSpeed(lane) {
        const r = Math.abs(lane);
        const laminar = 1.8 * (1 - r * r);
        const turbulent = 1.15 + 0.55 * (1 - Math.pow(r, 8));
        return (1 - state.mix) * laminar + state.mix * turbulent;
    }

    function update() {
        const v = parseFloat(vS.value);
        const re = v * d / nu;
        const cls = classify(re);

        state.v = v;
        state.re = re;
        Object.assign(state, cls);

        document.getElementById('v-re-val').textContent = v.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('re-dominant').textContent = cls.dominant;
        document.getElementById('re-profile').textContent = cls.profile;
        document.getElementById('re-explainer').textContent = `Za brzinu ${v.toFixed(2)} m/s dobivaš Re ≈ ${re.toFixed(0)}. Zato je režim ${cls.regime.toLowerCase()}, dominira ${cls.dominant}, a profil brzine prelazi prema obliku: ${cls.profile}. Pragovi 2300 i 4000 označavaju kada uredni slojevi više ne mogu ostati stabilni.`;

        status.textContent = `Re = ${re.toFixed(0)} (${cls.regime})`;
        if (cls.regime === 'Laminarno') {
            status.style.background = '#dcfce7';
            status.style.borderColor = '#bbf7d0';
            status.style.color = '#166534';
        } else if (cls.regime === 'Prijelazno') {
            status.style.background = '#fef3c7';
            status.style.borderColor = '#fde68a';
            status.style.color = '#92400e';
        } else {
            status.style.background = '#fee2e2';
            status.style.borderColor = '#fecaca';
            status.style.color = '#991b1b';
        }
    }

    function streamlineY(x, lane, pipe) {
        const amp = state.regime === 'Laminarno' ? 0 : (state.regime === 'Prijelazno' ? 5 : 12);
        const ramp = Math.max(0, (x - pipe.x) / pipe.w);
        const wiggle = amp * ramp * (0.25 + Math.abs(lane)) * Math.sin(x * 0.03 + state.time * 0.05 + lane * 5.5);
        return pipe.cy + lane * (pipe.h / 2 - 12) + wiggle;
    }

    function draw() {
        state.time += 1;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const pipe = { x: 42, y: 72, w: 520, h: 196, cy: 170 };
        const profile = { x: 620, y: 58, w: 230, h: 224 };

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0b1220';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, pipe.y, 0, pipe.y + pipe.h);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(37,99,235,0.18)');
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(96,165,250,0.28)');
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(37,99,235,0.18)');
        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(pipe.x, pipe.y, pipe.w, pipe.h);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(pipe.x, pipe.y, pipe.w, pipe.h);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.font = '700 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('strujnice u cijevi', pipe.x, 34);
        ctx.fillText('profil brzine', profile.x, 34);

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.35)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.3;
        lanes.forEach((lane) => {
            ctx.beginPath();
            for (let x = pipe.x + 8; x <= pipe.x + pipe.w - 8; x += 12) {
                const y = streamlineY(x, lane, pipe);
                if (x === pipe.x + 8) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
            ctx.stroke();
        });

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            particle.phase = (particle.phase + 0.0015 * state.v * laneSpeed(particle.lane) * particle.bias) % 1;
            const x = pipe.x + particle.phase * pipe.w;
            const y = streamlineY(x, particle.lane, pipe);
            ctx.fillStyle = state.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 2.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        if (state.regime === 'Turbulentno') {
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(248,113,113,0.75)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1.7;
            [pipe.x + 390, pipe.x + 450].forEach((cx, index) => {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(cx, pipe.cy + (index === 0 ? -42 : 44), 18, 0, Math.PI * 1.8);
                ctx.stroke();
            });
        }

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(profile.x, profile.y, profile.w, profile.h);
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.5)';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(profile.x + 44, profile.y + 12);
        ctx.lineTo(profile.x + 44, profile.y + profile.h - 12);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.font = '11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('brzina', profile.x + 86, profile.y + profile.h - 12);

        ctx.strokeStyle = state.color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        let first = true;
        for (let yIndex = 0; yIndex <= 40; yIndex += 1) {
            const lane = -1 + (yIndex / 40) * 2;
            const y = profile.y + 16 + (yIndex / 40) * (profile.h - 32);
            const x = profile.x + 44 + (laneSpeed(lane) / 1.8) * 140;
            if (first) {
                ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                first = false;
            } else {
                ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        lanes.forEach((lane) => {
            const y = profile.y + 16 + ((lane + 1) / 2) * (profile.h - 32);
            const x = profile.x + 44 + (laneSpeed(lane) / 1.8) * 140;
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.18)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(profile.x + 44, y);
            ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            ctx.stroke();
        });

        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    vS.oninput = update;
    update();
    draw();
})();
</script>

```


## Dodatni primjeri {.unnumbered}

### Dodatni primjer Z121 — Turbulentno strujanje zraka {.unnumbered}

Zrak struji kroz 7 m dug pravokutni ventilacijski kanal dimenzija $150 \times 200\,\text{mm}$. Kanal je izrađen od pocinčanog lima ($k=4,5 \cdot 10^{-5}\,\text{m}$), tlak zraka je $101325\,\text{Pa}$, temperatura $35^\circ\text{C}$, a srednja brzina strujanja $7\,\text{m/s}$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$L=7\,\text{m}$, $b=200\,\text{mm}$, $h=150\,\text{mm}$, $p=101325\,\text{Pa}$, $t=35^\circ\text{C}$, $v_{sr}=7\,\text{m/s}$, $k=0,045\,\text{mm}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$\Delta p$; $P$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. $d_{ekv} = \frac{4A}{O} = \mathbf{0,1714 \, \text{m}}$.
2. $Re = \mathbf{72507}$ (Turbulentno).
3. $\lambda = \mathbf{0,0204}$ (uz $k/d = 0,00026$).
4. $\Delta p = \mathbf{23,3 \, \text{Pa}}, P = \dot{V} \Delta p = \mathbf{4,9 \, \text{W}}$.

***
